issue_title: Remove fa-fw from main logo to fix Font Awesome duotone issues
issue_body_preview: ## Description This removes `fa-fw` from the main logo icon since it does not need to align with any other icons, and this fixes the padding issues that can happen with Font Awesome duotone icons. After the fix:
test_description_zh: 在首页查看主 Logo 图标（尤其是使用 Font Awesome duotone 类型图标时），观察图标的显示效果，包括尺寸、内边距和对齐情况。
expected_result_zh: 主 Logo 图标应正常渲染，无异常的内边距或尺寸偏差，duotone 图标显示完整且位置居中，不出现错位或多余空白。
